nasb.text: But all the silver and gold and articles of bronze and iron are holy to the Lord; they shall go into the treasury of the Lord.”

esv.text: But all silver and gold, and every vessel of bronze and iron, are holy to the Lord; they shall go into the treasury of the Lord.”

cnv.text: 可是，所有的金銀和銅鐵的器皿，都要歸耶和華為聖，存入耶和華的庫房中。”

ccb.text: 要把所有的金银和铜铁器皿分别出来献给耶和华，放进耶和华的库房里。”
